zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma "Emily" Self於1505年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾納希比時，她的父親William Self26歲，母親Mrs William Self21歲。她於1531年之前與Thomas Yorke在英國諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1571年11月26日在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾米德萊頓 切尼哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma "Emily" Self于1505年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾納希比时，她的父亲William Self26岁，母亲Mrs William Self21岁。她于1531年之前与Thomas Yorke在英国諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1571年11月26日在她的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾米德萊頓 切尼哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Self
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): from the Middle English personal name Sa(h)ulf (Old English Sǣwulf, from sǣ ‘sea’ + wulf ‘wolf’).
North German: nickname from Low German self ‘self’ for a self-important person.

variants.name: Silverstone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Aron, Emanuel, Herschel.

English: habitational name from Silverstone (Northamptonshire), probably from the Old English personal name Sigewulf (genitive Sigewulfes) or Sǣwulf (genitive Sǣwulfes; see Self ) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Silberstein  .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

nameMeanings.name: "Emily"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval form of the Latin name Aemilia, the feminine version of the old Roman family name Aemilius (probably from aemulus ‘rival’). It was not common in the Middle Ages, but was revived in the 19th century and is extremely popular throughout the English-speaking world today. Its best-known 19th‐century bearer was probably the novelist and poet Emily Brontë ( 1818–48 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Emma "Emily" Self was born in 1505, in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Self, was 26 and her mother, Mrs William Self, was 21. She married Thomas Yorke before 1531, in Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 November 1571, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Middleton Cheney, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma "Emily" Self est née en 1505, à Naseby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Self, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs William Self, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Yorke avant 1531, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 novembre 1571, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints Churchyard, Middleton Cheney, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat vor 1531 in Northamptonshire, England Thomas Yorke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. November 1571 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in All Saints Churchyard, Middleton Cheney, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma "Emily" Selfが1505年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアナセビーで生まれた時，父William Selfは26歳，母Mrs William Selfは21歳であった。1531年以前にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでThomas Yorkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1571年11月26日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアミッドレトン チェンエイアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Naseby, Daventry: 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 미들레턴 천이 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Emma "Emily" Self(이)가 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 나세비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Self(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs William Self(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1531년 이전 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 Thomas Yorke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 11월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 미들레턴 천이 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Yorke antes 1531, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.All Saints Churchyard, Naseby, Daventry: алл сеинц чурчярд, миддлетон чэни, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma "Emily" Self родилась в 1505 г. в местности неисеби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Self было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs William Self, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Yorke перед 1531 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 ноября 1571 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, миддлетон чэни, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
